title_en: Mott Sweeps Exacta in Poker Stakes

description: Powerhouse operations Coolmore and Newgate Farm have teamed up to stand classy operator Wodeton for the 2026 breeding season.

description: Fireball Miss stamped herself a star of the future and sealed an incredible double for her dam Femme Fireball with a dominant triumph in the June 6 Queensland Oaks (G1) at Eagle Farm Racecourse.

title_en: All-Sources Handle on Belmont Stakes Dips; Card Rises
description: All-sources handle for the Belmont Stakes, which was carded as race 13 of 14, was $50,876,383, a dip from last year's $55,456,793.

title_en: Two Goals, One Heartache for St. Elias Stable's Viola
description: Vinnie Viola of St. Elias Stable celebrates two grade 1 victories June 6 at Saratoga, including the Belmont Stakes (G1) with Golden Tempo, but his thoughts return to the death of his lifelong friend Dominic DiPrisco.

title_en: Golden Tempo Quiets Doubters in Belmont Stakes
description: Golden Tempo, who sprung a 23-1 upset in the Kentucky Derby (G1) five weeks ago at Churchill Downs and skipped the Preakness Stakes (G1), used his same late-running style to capture the $2 million Belmont Stakes (G1) June 6 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Deterministic Repeats in Manhattan Stakes
description: Deterministic notches his fifth consecutive graded stakes victory with a repeat victory in the $1 million Manhattan Stakes (G1T) June 6 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Reef Runner Surges to Win Spa's Jaipur
description: The rigors of traveling to and competing in the Middle East can be withering for some horses, but not Reef Runner.

title_en: Nysos Rolls to Victory in Met Mile
description: Nysos wins the Metropolitan Handicap (G1) in style June 6 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Englishman Runs Away With Woody Stephens
description: Englishman crushes the field in the Woody Stephens Stakes (G1) June 6 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Book'em Danno Rallies Past Bentornato in True North
description: Champion male sprinter Book'em Danno rallies past Eclipse Award finalist Bentornato by three-quarters of a length in the $400,000 True North Stakes (G3), winning the race for the second straight year.

title_en: Classic Q Caps Big Weekend for Casse in Just a Game
description: Classic Q wins the Just a Game Stakes (G1T) June 6 at Saratoga Race Course, defeating French shipper Mandanaba and favored Segesta.

description: The June 6 Coronation Cup Stakes (G1), billed as a titanic clash between Jan Brueghel and Calandagan, instead proves a coming-out party of runaway winner Bay City Roller.

description: Mostly cloudy skies and temperatures in the low 80s are expected for much of the afternoon on June 6, Belmont Stakes Day, before a threat of rain arrives late afternoon.

description: Nitrogen rolls to a dominating, 12 3/4-length triumph in the $500,000 Ogden Phipps Stakes (G1) June 5 at Saratoga Race Course.

description: Klaravich Stables' Portfolio Duration displayed grit to hold off the fast-charging Cankoura to narrowly win the $750,000 New York Stakes (G1T) June 5 at Saratoga Race Course.

description: Fitz Right draws clear of a stubborn Lion Lake to win the Wonder Again Stakes (G2T) at Saratoga Race Course.

description: Counting Stars, third behind Always a Runner and Meaning in the May 1 Kentucky Oaks (G1) at Churchill Downs, avenges that loss with a 3 3/4-length victory in the June 5 Acorn Stakes (G1) at Saratoga Race Course.

description: Still to be addressed is whether Resorts World New York City is directly responsible for future payments. The New York State Gaming Commission believes the subsidies are to be paid in addition to state taxes.

description: Belmont Stakes Racing Festival notes, updating plans for June 4 winners.

title_en: Controversial Grade 1-Winning Trainer Guillot Dies
description: Multiple grade 1-winning trainer Eric Guillot, who was celebrated for his talents working with horses and his gumbo but sometimes brought controversy to the sport he loved, dies June 4 in Magnolia, Ark. He was 64.

description: Gainesway's marquee sire Tapit is tied with Lexington as the leading sire of Belmont Stakes winners with four. Lexington's Belmont winners won the race between 1868 and 1878.

title_en: Stakes Winner Tap Into This to Stand at Valor Farm
description: Tap Into This, a son of leading sire Tapit, never finished out of the money in 10 career starts and had his racing career ended abruptly by a suspensory injury. He hails from the immediate family of Eclipse champion grass mare Islington.

title_en: Accomplished Owner/Breeder Susan Casner Dies May 27
description: Casner was instrumental in helping her husband and trainer Bill Casner develop a successful racing stable and was later involved in the development of WinStar Farm, a venture started by Bill Casner and Kenny Troutt.

description: While a life-threatening injury ended Dancinginmydreams' promising racing career, caring connections helped her forge a new path to the sport's heights that reached a crescendo with Golden Tempo's Kentucky Derby (G1) win.

title_en: Breeders' Cup Announces 2026 Member Election Results
description: Breeders' Cup Limited announced June 2 that 22 individuals have been elected to serve as Breeders' Cup members.

description: In the fall of 1777, the Battles of Saratoga proved pivotal in the Revolutionary War. Now, 249 years later, the Belmont Racing Festival might be the turning point in the race for top sire.

description: The 13-year-old son of Curlin has sired two classic-placed runners this year.

description: Molly Mooney will assume responsibility for nominations and client relations at the Aga Khan Studs operation in Ireland.

description: John Morgan meets with the Florida Thoroughbred Breeders' and Owners' Association board and leadership at the FTBOA headquarters in Ocala to outline his vision for the sustainable future of Florida Thoroughbred racing and breeding.
